For S3, CloudFront, and TypeScript Defend the Copy Replace Metadata model · Theory Copy Replace Metadata, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, file, object, policy, transfer, integrity, cache, fault, cost, restore, and controlled AWS transfer evidence: CopyObject automatically preserves every source property and authorization rule. Type annotations, generated SDK shapes, and resolved promises do not strengthen that runtime claim.
